mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_table_operation WHERE table_code = #{tableCode} AND status = 1 ORDER BY sort_order
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_table_operation SET operation_name = #{operationName}, operation_type = #{operationType}, icon = #{icon}, permission = #{permission}, position = #{position}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_table_operation SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
